locations.clearing: You come to in a cold clearing. Dew on flattened grass, a silence that has not decided about you yet, and the fading memory of falling. There is no hazard here. A gap in the trees opens onto a forest path to the north.
locations.forest_path: A forest path threads north under bare branches. The treeline stands at your back like a held breath. Somewhere ahead the woods go deep.

wait: You wait. Six in-world seconds turn without you.
idle: Nothing here has an opinion about you yet.

rejections.resource_conflict: Two claims land on one part of you at once. Nothing resolves; the round is handed back.
rejections.unknown_verb: You attempt something the world has no grammar for. It does not happen.
rejections.unknown_target: You reach for something that is not here.
rejections.unknown_resource: That is not a part of you that answers to orders.
rejections.illegal_move: There is no path that way.
